introSection: Insomnio is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Kataplum in Mexico City, Mexico. It opened on 1 November 2018, along with the park. Insomnio is Spanish for Insomnia.
fullText:
Insomnio is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Kataplum in Mexico City, Mexico. It opened on 1 November 2018, along with the park. Insomnio is Spanish for Insomnia.

Yellow track and turquoise supports.
